name: Candelaria Mining Corp.
summary: Candelaria Mining Corp. primarily engages in the exploration and development of gold deposits in Canada and Mexico. The company also explores for silver. It holds 100% interests is the Caballo Blanco Project located on the eastern coast of Mexico in the state of Veracruz; and the Pinos project located in the municipality of Pinos, Zacatecas state in north-central Mexico. The company was formerly known as Branco Resources Ltd. Candelaria Mining Corp. was incorporated in 2012 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
